inputs.command: cd /home/hagaybar/projects/rare-books-bot && echo "=== TypeScript ===" && cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -3 && echo "=== Build ===" && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -3 && echo "=== API Test ===" && cd /home/hagaybar/projects/rare-books-bot && curl -s 'http://localhost:8000/metadata/enrichment/agent-records?wikidata_id=Q319902' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(f'{d["display_name"]}: {d["record_count"]} records')" && echo "=== Done ==="
